files.scripts/install.sh:
cd MediaBrowser.Model
dotnet add package System.Text.Json --version 8.0.5
cd ..
cd Emby.Server.Implementations
dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory --version 9.0.0
cd ..
cd tests
cd Jellyfin.Server.Tests
dotnet add package Microsoft.Extensions.Options --version 9.0.0
cd ..
cd ..
dotnet build
dotnet add "./tests/Jellyfin.Server.Implementations.Tests/Jellyfin.Server.Implementations.Tests.csproj" package JUnitTestLogger
